OrderFulfillment_Orchestration.description: Master order fulfillment orchestration — receives order from e-commerce, checks inventory, routes to 3PL, and triggers SAP SD order creation.

scripts.name: InventoryAllocator
scripts.purpose: Multi-location inventory allocation logic with priority warehouse selection

scripts.name: 3PLRoutingEngine
scripts.purpose: Selects optimal 3PL based on delivery SLA, carrier rates, and regional availability

InventoryLevel_Sync_Batch.description: Scheduled nightly batch sync of inventory levels from SAP WM to OMS and e-commerce platform.

CustomerLoyalty_Event_Process.description: JMS consumer for customer loyalty events — processes point accumulation, tier changes, and reward redemptions.

scripts.name: TierEvaluator
scripts.purpose: Evaluates tier change eligibility based on annual spend and frequency thresholds

POS_Transaction_Inbound.description: SFTP file listener for POS transaction files — parses daily transaction export, validates, and posts to SAP FI.

activities.label: Parse POS XML to Internal Format

scripts.name: POSTransactionValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates transaction totals, cash drawer balances, and detects missing transactions

Supplier_EDI_Processing.description: Complex supplier EDI processing — inbound 850 PO from retailers, processes through SAP MM, generates 855/856 responses, handles exceptions.

scripts.name: EDIDuplicateChecker
scripts.purpose: Validates ISA control number uniqueness within 30-day dedup window

scripts.name: PartnerProfileResolver
scripts.purpose: Resolves trading partner EDI settings from multi-level config hierarchy

scripts.name: EDIValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates EDI 850 segment structure, mandatory fields, and code list values

Store_Replenishment_API.description: REST API endpoint for store managers to request stock replenishment, which creates a SAP PR (Purchase Requisition).

Price_Update_Broadcast.description: JMS consumer for SAP pricing condition change events — broadcasts price updates to POS terminals and e-commerce.

Customer_Returns_Process.description: Returns processing API — creates SAP SD return order from store system request and initiates refund workflow.

scripts.name: ReturnPolicyValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates return against product return policy, time window, and receipt validation

Finance_GL_Interface.description: Scheduled end-of-day GL posting batch — aggregates store-level sales and cash transactions and posts to SAP FI.

activities.label: Map to SAP FI GL Journal XSLT
Post GL Journal to SAP FI

scripts.name: JournalBalanceValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates debit/credit balance of journal entries before SAP posting

Loyalty_Points_Calc.description: Event-driven loyalty points calculation on purchase events from POS system.

scripts.name: PointsMultiplierEngine
scripts.purpose: Applies product category multipliers, promotional bonus rules, and partner earn rates

Warehouse_Pick_Ticket.description: JMS event consumer for warehouse pick ticket generation when orders are released in OMS.

Supplier_Invoice_Match.description: SFTP-triggered supplier invoice matching — picks up supplier invoice files, performs 3-way match against SAP PO/GR, posts approved invoices.

scripts.name: ThreeWayMatchEngine
scripts.purpose: Compares invoice amount, quantity, and price against PO and GR within configurable tolerance bands

scripts.name: ExceptionClassifier
scripts.purpose: Classifies invoice exceptions by type (price, quantity, missing GR) and routes to correct AP worklist

Campaign_Trigger_Event.description: JMS consumer for customer segment events that triggers marketing campaign execution in CRM.

Stock_Count_Reconcile.description: Scheduled stock count reconciliation — compares physical count uploads from stores with SAP inventory and generates variance report.

activities.label: Post Recount Request to Store Portal

scripts.name: VarianceThresholdEvaluator
scripts.purpose: Applies category-specific variance thresholds (% and absolute amount) to flag significant discrepancies

Order_Status_Notification.description: Event consumer that sends order status email notifications to customers when order status changes.

EDI_855_PO_Acknowledgement.description: Outbound EDI 855 PO Acknowledgement generation from SAP SD order confirmation to retail trading partners via AS2.

scripts.name: EDI855SegmentBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds BAK/PO1/CTT segments with line-level acceptance/rejection codes

scripts.name: AS2EnvelopeBuilder
scripts.purpose: Builds AS2 envelope with partner-specific ISA/GS segments and MDN settings

HR_Payroll_Interface.description: Scheduled payroll data interface from SAP HCM to external payroll bureau via SFTP.

activities.label: Extract Payroll Data from SAP HCM View

scripts.name: PayrollDataEncryptor
scripts.purpose: PGP-encrypts payroll file before SFTP transmission to bureau

Cash_Register_Sync.description: Scheduled sync of cash register configuration from SAP to POS terminals.

activities.label: Get Register Config from SAP View
POST Config to POS Terminal API

Product_Taxonomy_Update.description: Scheduled sync of product category hierarchy from SAP to e-commerce platform.

activities.label: GET Product Hierarchy from SAP OData

Return_Auth_Processing.description: Return authorization API — validates return eligibility, generates RMA number, and creates SAP sales return.

scripts.name: ReturnWindowValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates return request against product-specific return policies and purchase date window

Vendor_Payment_Batch.description: Scheduled vendor payment batch — processes SAP FI payment runs and generates BACS/SEPA payment files for bank submission.

activities.label: Write SEPA Credit Transfer to Bank SFTP
Write BACS File to Bank SFTP
Update Payment Status in SAP View

scripts.name: IBANValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates IBAN format and checksum for SEPA transactions across 36 country formats

scripts.name: SortCodeValidator
scripts.purpose: Validates UK sort codes and account numbers for BACS payment files

Cross_Channel_Order_Merge.description: Complex cross-channel order orchestration — merges online, mobile, and in-store orders into unified SAP SD order with inventory allocation and fulfillment routing.

scripts.name: MultiSiteInventoryAllocator
scripts.purpose: Optimizes inventory allocation across 200+ store and DC locations based on proximity, SLA, and stock levels

scripts.name: FulfillmentRoutingEngine
scripts.purpose: Determines optimal fulfillment point using ML-weighted scoring of cost, speed, and capacity

scripts.name: CompensationHandler
scripts.purpose: Implements saga compensation pattern — rolls back SAP order and OMS allocation on partial failure

SAP_GL_Journal_Entry_Sync.description: Scheduled synchronisation of General Ledger journal entries from SLB operational systems to SAP FI, with cost centre and profit centre validation.

scripts.name: CostObjectValidator
scripts.purpose: Validate cost object assignments against SAP CO master data

scripts.name: GLAccountDetermination
scripts.purpose: Auto-determine GL account from cost category and business transaction type

AP_Invoice_Workflow_3Way_Match.description: End-to-end accounts payable invoice workflow with 3-way matching against PO and GR, exception routing, and SAP FI posting for SLB vendor invoices.

scripts.name: InvoiceOCRProcessor
scripts.purpose: Extract invoice fields from PDF using SLB vendor template library

scripts.name: ThreeWayMatchEngine
scripts.purpose: Perform 3-way match with configurable price and quantity tolerances per vendor

scripts.name: APExceptionRouter
scripts.purpose: Route invoice exceptions based on amount thresholds and cost centre authority matrix

Project_Billing_Revenue_Export.description: Export drilling project billing data from SAP PS to SLB client billing system, generating invoices for day-rate, footage, and performance-based contracts.

scripts.name: ContractRateCalculator
scripts.purpose: Calculate billing amounts from contract rate schedules with day-rate tiers

scripts.name: TaxDetermination
scripts.purpose: Determine applicable tax rates by country and service type for invoice generation

Cost_Center_Budget_Allocation.description: Annual and quarterly cost centre budget allocation from SLB planning system to SAP CO budget management.

Treasury_FX_Rate_Integration.description: Ingest daily foreign exchange rates from Reuters/Bloomberg treasury feed and update SAP FI exchange rate table for multi-currency postings.

scripts.name: RateReasonablenessCheck
scripts.purpose: Validate FX rates are within configurable tolerance bands vs prior day rate

Fixed_Assets_Depreciation_Sync.description: Synchronise fixed asset additions and disposals from SLB asset management system to SAP FI-AA for depreciation calculation and financial reporting.

Tax_Compliance_Reporting_SFTP.description: Generate and transmit tax compliance reports for multiple jurisdictions from SAP FI to tax authorities via SFTP, supporting VAT, WHT, and country-specific formats.

scripts.name: CountryTaxFormatter
scripts.purpose: Build country-specific tax report formats for 15+ jurisdictions where SLB operates

Workforce_Onboarding_Integration.description: End-to-end employee onboarding integration from SAP SuccessFactors to SAP HCM, provisioning IT access, rig safety training enrollment, and equipment assignment.

scripts.name: PersonnelNumberGenerator
scripts.purpose: Generate SAP personnel numbers following SLB numbering convention by country and entity

scripts.name: RoleProfileDeterminator
scripts.purpose: Determine IT access role profile based on job code, country, and business unit

Leave_Absence_Management_Sync.description: Synchronise leave and absence requests between SAP SuccessFactors Time and SAP HCM, including offshore rotation leave for rig crew.

Payroll_Delta_SF_SAP_PY.description: Payroll delta processing from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP HCM Payroll, handling multi-country payroll with hazard pay, offshore allowances, and COLA adjustments.

scripts.name: OffshoreAllowanceCalculator
scripts.purpose: Calculate offshore rotation allowances, hazard pay, and living-out allowances by location

scripts.name: MultiCountryTaxProcessor
scripts.purpose: Apply correct tax withholding rules for 40+ countries where SLB employs staff

scripts.name: PayrollAuditTrailBuilder
scripts.purpose: Build immutable payroll audit trail for SOX compliance and regulatory requirements

Training_Certification_Track.description: Track mandatory safety training and professional certifications for SLB rig crews and field engineers, syncing completions from LMS to SAP HCM qualifications.

Org_Structure_Headcount_Publish.description: Publish SAP SuccessFactors organisation structure and headcount data to management dashboards, workforce planning tools, and downstream HR systems.

scripts.name: HeadcountAggregator
scripts.purpose: Aggregate headcount by org unit, location, contract type, and grade band

Procurement_PO_Ariba_SAP_Sync.description: Synchronise purchase orders between SAP Ariba sourcing and SAP MM procurement, including contract compliance checks and supplier confirmation handling.

scripts.name: ContractComplianceChecker
scripts.purpose: Verify PO adheres to active framework agreements and preferred supplier contracts

Supplier_Master_Data_Dist.description: Distribute approved supplier master data from SAP Ariba supplier lifecycle management to SAP MM vendor master across all SLB company codes.

Contract_Lifecycle_SAP_Sync.description: Synchronise contract lifecycle events from SAP Ariba contracts to SAP MM outline agreements and SAP PS project contracts.

scripts.name: ContractTypeResolver
scripts.purpose: Map Ariba contract categories to correct SAP MM document types and purchasing organisations

EDI_850_Supplier_PO_Outbound.description: Outbound EDI 850 Purchase Order transmission to critical suppliers via AS2 for MRO materials, chemicals, and equipment parts.

scripts.name: X12850Builder
scripts.purpose: Build compliant X12 EDI 850 transaction sets with segment validation and ISA/GS envelope

scripts.name: EDIPartnerConfigLoader
scripts.purpose: Load EDI partner configuration including AS2 URLs, certificates, and ISA identifiers

Logistics_Freight_Cost_Tracking.description: Track freight costs from third-party logistics providers and post actual transportation costs to SAP CO cost centres for rig mobilisation and supply chain.

scripts.name: FreightCostAllocator
scripts.purpose: Allocate freight costs to correct WBS elements and cost centres based on shipment destination

Customs_Clearance_Integration.description: Integrate customs clearance status from freight forwarders with SAP MM goods receipt and SAP GTS global trade services for import compliance.

scripts.name: ExportControlChecker
scripts.purpose: Verify materials against SLB export control list and embargo country restrictions

scripts.name: DutyCalculationValidator
scripts.purpose: Validate customs duty amounts against tariff schedule for audit purposes

Rig_Mobilization_Logistics_Sync.description: Coordinate rig mobilisation logistics including equipment manifests, crew transport, and third-party equipment with SAP PS project planning and SAP PM equipment tracking.

activities.label: Mob Plan to SAP PS Map

scripts.name: ResourceAvailabilityChecker
scripts.purpose: Check equipment and crew availability across SLB global fleet for mobilisation window

scripts.name: MobCostEstimator
scripts.purpose: Estimate mobilisation costs from historical data and current rate cards for AFE preparation

Port_Demurrage_Alert_Flow.description: Monitor vessel and cargo port dwell times, alert logistics team when approaching demurrage thresholds to avoid excess port charges.

Operations_KPI_Dashboard_Feed.description: Feed operational KPIs from SAP and field systems to SLB management dashboard, including rig utilisation, NPT, and HSE metrics.

scripts.name: KPIAggregationEngine
scripts.purpose: Aggregate KPIs across business lines, geographies, and time periods for dashboard display

Production_Volume_Report_Sync.description: Sync production volume reports from client operator systems to SLB internal reporting platform for revenue calculation and contract performance tracking.

scripts.name: VolumeReconciliationEngine
scripts.purpose: Reconcile reported production volumes against contract commitments and flag variances
